title: Tunisian Korean-Pear Bake
description: A flavorful and refreshing brunch dish featuring Korean-pear, perfect for a weekend morning. The combination of fermented flavors and crispy salt-baked crust will leave you wanting more.

ingredients.name: Korean Pear
ingredients.notes: use a firm variety such as Shinseiki

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: flaky sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
In a small bowl, mix together sesame seeds, coconut sugar, fermented chili flakes, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together olive oil, chopped cilantro, minced garlic, and lemon juice.
Cut the Korean pear in half and place it on the prepared baking sheet.
Drizzle the pear with the oil mixture and sprinkle with the sesame seed mixture.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the pear is tender and the top is caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
